commands.clear.description: clear all of your communication record with llm.
commands.video.description: using volcengine video model create video.
commands.chat.description: allows the bot to chat through /chat command in groups.
commands.task.description: multi agents communicate with each other, get the result.
commands.mcp.description: multi agents communicate with each other base on mcp server, get the result.
commands.skill.description: execute a specific skill by id.

token_exceed: ❌exceed token limit, used token: %d, available token: %d, total available token: %d
mcp_empty_content: please input mcp prompt, or use `/mcp list` to inspect the available MCP servers
skill_empty_content: please input `skill id` and `prompt`, or use `/skill list` and `/skill validate`
skill_reserved_prompt: skill `{{.skill_id}}` expects a real prompt. Use `/skill list` or `/skill validate` as standalone commands instead.
mode_change_fail: this mode just uses in local installed deepseek
help_text:
Available Commands:

/chat   - Chat with TinyClaw.

/task   - Ask the Agent platform to plan and execute a task.

/mcp    - Run a controlled MCP/Skill task.

/mcp list - Show available MCP servers and tools.

/skill list - Show available skills.

/skill validate - Validate local and builtin skill packages.

/skill <id|alias> <prompt> - Execute a specific skill directly.

/approve <id> - Approve a pending device action.

/reject <id> - Reject a pending device action.

/mode   - Show current model type and model.

/state  - View current token usage.

/clear  - Clear communication records and reset context.

/retry  - Retry your last question.

/txt\_type /txt\_model - Choose the text model type and model.

/help   - Show this help message.

Optional modules: media generation, Cron, legacy bots, and legacy MCP proxies are disabled by default. Enable them explicitly with ENABLE_MEDIA, ENABLE_CRON, ENABLE_LEGACY_BOTS, or ENABLE_LEGACY_MCP_PROXY.
photo_handle_prompt: Extract all the text from the image and return only the text.
set_pre_prompt_success: 🚀 Successfully set command, please upload photo/voice in 5 min.
mix_mode_choose: Please go to {{.link}} to choose a model. Use /$command xxx, for example /txt\_model gpt-5-chat-latest, to select a model.
audio_rec_prompt: get Content from this audio clip, only return the content
